children.text: Personal Strava runs stored in Supabase. Connect once, then sync to pull activity history (runs only). The map and table highlight the last 365 days.

Routes from the last 365 days with GPS polylines from Strava. The map defaults to the Minneapolis–Saint Paul area when you have runs there; zoom and pan to explore everywhere. Lines are your full recorded paths.

Most recent 365-day window (up to 25 rows). Location, shoe, and relative effort come from Strava when available. When Strava only has GPS start points, place names are resolved from coordinates (city-level, via OpenStreetMap). Open Strava for full activity details.

seo.metaDescription: Personal Strava runs synced to this site.
